title: ICU glycemic control documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting clinician-discussed A1C or CGM goals, health and functional status, comorbidity, treatment risk, burden and shared preferences without automatically applying a numeric goal.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports individualized clinician-set goals without generating a target.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting clinician-discussed A1C or CGM goals, health and functional status, comorbidity, treatment risk, burden and shared preferences without automatically applying a numeric goal.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

medication.text: Supports reviewing hypoglycaemia history at encounters, awareness, high-risk or severe events, clinician-led treatment-plan reevaluation, structured education and glucagon discussion without inserting treatment instructions.
medication.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed hypoglycaemia risk and prevention context.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports reviewing hypoglycaemia history at encounters, awareness, high-risk or severe events, clinician-led treatment-plan reevaluation, structured education and glucagon discussion without inserting treatment instructions.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

follow_up.text: Supports clinician review of A1C and/or CGM metrics and an individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.
follow_up.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed glycaemic status and trend.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of A1C and/or CGM metrics and an individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

sources_used.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
sources_used.jurisdiction: International guideline published by a United States professional organisation

source_limitations: Diabetes status, glucose trend, nutrition, medicines, insulin, organ function and hypoglycaemia events are absent.
No glucose target, insulin dose, infusion change, dextrose or nutrition action is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
